name: Dog Fest Calcium Bones With Duck 90G
description: A milk bone enriched with calcium and covered with tender duck for great taste. One of the favorite puppy treats ever doesn't just let your dog enjoy great taste, but also supports the healthy growth of bones and teeth. Composition: duck, calcium bone, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 25, crude fat 2.5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4, moisture 18.
